histogram.name: ContextualTasks.ActiveTab.UserAction.LinkClicked
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a user clicks on a link embedded in the active tab shown alongside the contextual tasks panel. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.ActiveTasksCount
histogram.summary: Records the number of active tasks (tasks that are open in a full tab or in the side panel). This is recorded every time a task is created on the local device.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.AiPage.NavigationInterceptionSource
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a navigation to an AI page is intercepted in the contextual tasks framework. Records the source of the initial entrypoint.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.AiResponse.UserAction.LinkClicked.{ContextualTasksUiSurface}
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a user clicks on a link embedded in the AI response on the contextual tasks page. Split out by the contextual tasks form factor (panel or tab) that the link was clicked on.Always recorded as true.

variant.name: Panel
variant.summary: The link was clicked when the contextual tasks panel was open.

variant.name: Tab
variant.summary: The link was clicked when the contextual tasks UI was displayed in full tab.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.BackButton.UserAction.NavigatedFromSidePanelToFullTab
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a user navigates from side panel to full tab using the back button in the browser. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Composebox.UserAction.AddedActiveTabAfterDeletingAutoSuggestion
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a user explicitly adds the active tab after previously deleting the auto-suggestion. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.ContextCalculationLatency
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is made in the contextual tasks framework and context was calculated successfully. Records the duration it took to calculate context for the query.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.ContextDeterminationStatus
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is entered by the user (before being sent) in the contextual tasks framework. Records the status of context determination (success or failure reason).

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.DurationSinceLastActive
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks. Records seconds (upto 3600) since each of the tab was active.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.EmbeddingSimilarityScore
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks. Records 100*best_similarity_score between query embeddings and passage embeddings for the page.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.ExplicitTabsCount
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks framework and context was calculated successfully. Records the number of tabs that were explicitly chosen to be uploaded by the user. Note that tabs with the same URL are only counted once.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.MatchingWordsCount
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks framework and context was calculated successfully. Records the number of words that were in common between the query and the tab title.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.QueryEmbeddingLatency
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is made in the contextual tasks framework. Records the duration it took to calculate the query embedding.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.RelevantTabsCount
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks framework and context was calculated successfully. Records the number of tabs that were determined to be relevant to the query.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.TabExcessCount
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks framework and context was calculated successfully. Records the number of tabs with unique URLs that were predicted by the model but were not in the explicitly chosen set.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.TabOverlapCount
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks framework and context was calculated successfully. Records the number of tabs with unique URLsthat were in both the explicitly chosen set and the set that was predicted by the model.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.TabOverlapPercentage
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks framework and context was calculated successfully. Records the percentage of tabs with unique URLs that were in both the explicitly chosen set and the set that was predicted by the model. This is calculated by dividing the number of tabs that were in both sets by the number of tabs in the explicitly chosen set.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Context.TabScore
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a query is successfully made in the contextual tasks framework when using multi-signal scoring. Records the final computed score for each tab, multiplied by 100.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.HistoryNavigation.UserAction.NavigatedInFullTab
histogram.summary: Logged when the back or forward button is clicked while the user is viewing the Contextual Tasks full tab, causing a task switch. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.InnerFrameContents.HttpResponseCode
histogram.summary: Recorded every time the contextual tasks framework navigates the top level of the inner frame contents. Records the HTTP status code of the response when the navigation finishes.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.InnerFrameContents.HttpResponseCode.ExcludeZeroStateLoads
histogram.summary: Recorded every time the contextual tasks framework navigates the top level of the inner frame contents, excluding zero state loads. Records the HTTP status code of the response when the navigation finishes.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.Session.Completed
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a cobrowsing session has completed in the contextual tasks framework. This can happen if the side panel is explicitly closed by the user, the window housing the side panel is closed, or the Chrome session has ended. Note that a cobrowsing session is only considered to have started if a user enters a query via the side panel. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.TabAffiliationCount
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a tab is affiliated with a task. Records the number of tabs that are affiliated with the task that has the new affilation.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.TabChange.UserAction{ActionType}
histogram.summary: Recorded every time a tab change occurs and affects the contextual tasks panel state. {ActionType} Always recorded as true.

variant.name: .ChangedThreads
variant.summary: The user changed tabs which resulted in the side panel changing threads.

variant.name: .CloseSidePanel
variant.summary: The user changed tabs which resulted in the side panel closing.

variant.name: .OpenSidePanel
variant.summary: The user changed tabs which resulted in the side panel opening.

variant.name: .StayedOnThread
variant.summary: The user changed tabs which resulted in staying on the existing thread.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.VoiceSearch.State
histogram.summary: Tracks user interactions with the voice search feature on the Contextual Tasks composebox.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.WebUI.OAuthError
histogram.summary: Records the OAuth error when a token is requested for use in the embedded page of the WebUI. "None" indicates that the request was successful.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.WebUI.UserAction{ActionType}
histogram.summary: Recorded every time the user interacted with the contextual tasks web UI directly. {ActionType} Always recorded as true.

variant.name: .CloseSidePanel
variant.summary: The user closed the side panel.

variant.name: .OpenHelp
variant.summary: The user opened the help page.

variant.name: .OpenInNewTab
variant.summary: The user opened the task in a new tab.

variant.name: .OpenMyActivity
variant.summary: The user opened the My Activity page.

variant.name: .OpenNewThread
variant.summary: The user opened a new thread.

variant.name: .OpenSourcesMenu
variant.summary: The user opened the sources menu.

variant.name: .OpenThreadHistory
variant.summary: The user opened the thread history.

variant.name: .TabFromSourcesMenuClicked
variant.summary: The user clicked on a tab from the sources menu.

histogram.name: ContextualTasks.{EntrypointType}.UserAction{ActionType}
histogram.summary: Recorded every time the user interacted with the {EntrypointType}. {ActionType} Always recorded as true.

variant.name: .CloseSidePanel
variant.summary: The user closed the side panel.

variant.name: .OpenSidePanel
variant.summary: The user opened the side panel.
